brief_notes: Strong cognitive neuroscience paper combining BERT structural probing with EMEG source imaging. Tables report named statistical tests (paired t-tests, Spearman correlations, cluster-based permutation tests), effect sizes (Cohen's d), and p-values with FDR correction. All table cells are numeric. The paper has a coherent multi-level validation structure (behavioral pre-tests, corpus correlations, neural data). Limitations: small sample (n=16) acknowledged; cluster p-values are somewhat borderline; the 80ms temporal offset claim lacks formal statistical test of the lag difference. Citations appear plausible and field-appropriate.
